title: Refuse and Recyclable Material Collectors
description: Collect and dump refuse or recyclable materials from containers into truck. May drive truck.

tasks.text: Inspect trucks prior to beginning routes to ensure safe operating condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Drive trucks, following established routes, through residential streets or alleys or through business or industrial areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refuel trucks or add other fluids, such as oil or brake fluid.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dump refuse or recyclable materials at disposal sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate automated or semi-automated hoisting devices that raise refuse bins and dump contents into openings in truck bodies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismount garbage trucks to collect garbage and remount trucks to ride to the next collection point.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate equipment that compresses collected refuse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with dispatchers concerning delays, unsafe sites, accidents, equipment breakdowns, or other maintenance problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check road or weather conditions to determine how routes will be affected.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean trucks or compactor bodies after routes have been completed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tag garbage or recycling containers to inform customers of problems, such as excess garbage or inclusion of items that are not permitted.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make special pickups of recyclable materials, such as food scraps, used oil, discarded computers, or other electronic items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
